title: lgwks.tokenizer.registry.v1
description: Tokenizer/analyzer identity registry. Every stored tokenized artifact references a tokenizer registry row, so FTS, vector embeddings, graph edges, and chunk tables are tokenizer-aware and can be replayed or audited per analyzer version.

tokenizer_id.description: Canonical id, e.g. word_regex:v1 or aetherius:v0:sha256:abc123

kind.description: Analyzer family: aetherius, word_regex, uqa_analyzer, embed_port, etc.

config_json.description: JSON-serialized analyzer parameters (chunk size, BPE merges, regex pattern, etc.)

vocab_cid.description: Content-addressed vocab file; empty if not applicable

modality_anchors.description: Special tokens the analyzer emits for non-text modalities (e.g. [IMG], [TTY])

created_at.description: Seconds since epoch when the tokenizer was registered
